notes: Ship-readiness update. Company name and logo now print correctly on every document. A newly created company no longer shows a placeholder name on vouchers, invoices, payslips or tax certificates, and the setup screen will not let you go live with an unnamed organisation or before a period is open. Logo uploads are validated and resized so a wide banner or an unsupported image can no longer break a letterhead. Reports and exports are steadier: the Donor/Project statement export no longer fails on a name containing a slash, the Statement of Financial Position export now matches the printed statement, and 'Save as PDF' on payslips no longer produces an empty file. Bank reconciliation now keeps your draft adjustments when you reselect the same statement, and the General Ledger and reconciliation now carry the organisation name. A closed financial year can no longer be reopened by mistake. Backups warn clearly if the automatic backup fails or if the secure keychain is unavailable. Existing backups still restore normally.
